# PingOne Recognize

> AI agents should consult [Docs for Agents](https://developer.pingidentity.com/build-with-ai/docs-for-agents.md)
> for guidance on navigating Ping Identity documentation.

## Recognize

- [Account recovery](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/introduction/account_recovery.md): This page explains the options customers have when using PingOne Recognize to support account recovery.
- [Account Recovery](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-account-recovery.md): This page explains what we mean by account recovery and the context required to integrate it.
- [Add account](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/user-guide/user-guide-add-account-android.md): Add your first account by scanning a QR code.
- [Adding identifiers to authentication](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/web-sdk/web-sdk-reference-authentication-identifiers.md): "Shows how to add identifiers to a PingOne Recognize authentication operation for analytics, auditing, or telemetry purposes."
- [Authenticating in Auth0 with PingOne Recognize](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-authenticating-in-auth0.md): Integrate PingOne Recognize authentication with Auth0.
- [Authentication](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/introduction/authentication.md): This page explains the use cases and deployment methods for PingOne Recognize authentication.
- [Authentication](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/user-guide/user-guide-authentication.md): Authenticate using the Keyless Authenticator.
- [Authentication](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/web-sdk/web-sdk-guide-authentication.md): "Shows how to authenticate (sign-on) a new user by comparing their current facial biometrics with the ones saved during PingOne Recognize enrollment."
- [Browser requirements](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/web-sdk/web-sdk-guide-browser-requirements.md): "Shows which web browsers are supported by the PingOne Recognize Web SDK."
- [Camera permission flow](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/web-sdk/web-sdk-reference-camera-permission.md): "Describes how PingOne Recognize authorization and enrollment handles camera permission requests."
- [Changelog](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/web-sdk/web-sdk-changelog.md): Details recent changes to the PingOne Recognize Web SDK
- [Checking the installation completed successfully](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/on-premise/on-premise-checking-installation-successful.md): This page describes how to check that the installation of PingOne Recognize on-premise was successful.
- [Component interoperability](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/idv-bridge/idv-bridge-component-interoperability.md): Describes how to use client state to authenticate PingOne Recognize users on different platforms (web or mobile).
- [Component interoperability](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/introduction/component-interoperability.md): This page outlines how customers can allow users to authenticate on different platforms (web/mobile) regardless of which component they initially enroll from by leveraging client state.
- [Components](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-components.md): Learn about the interaction between PingOne Recognize components.
- [Components](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/on-premise/on-premise-backend-installation-components.md): Components of the PingOne Recognize backend.
- [Components](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/web-sdk/web-sdk-introduction-components.md): "Describes PingOne Recognize Web SDK components and how to use them."
- [Delete account](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/user-guide/user-guide-delete-account.md): Delete your Keyless Authenticator account.
- [Devices](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-server-api-devices.md): The Devices endpoints of the PingOne Recognize Mobile SDK Server API let you manage PingOne Recognize devices.
- [Dynamic Linking](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-dynamic-linking.md): Dynamic linking with PingOne Recognize allows you to display transaction information to the user and sign that information with PingOne Recognize authentication.
- [Enable backup](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/user-guide/user-guide-enable-backup.md): Enable backup to recover your account if you lose access to your device or reinstall the Keyless app.
- [Encrypting images and keys - Java examples](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/idv-bridge/idv-bridge-encrypting-images-and-keys-java.md): Examples of how to encrypt images and keys in Java to enroll users into PingOne Recognize with the IDV Bridge SaaS solution.
- [Enrollment](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/introduction/enrollment.md): This page explains two enrollment options customers can use to enroll users into PingOne Recognize for ongoing authentication.
- [Enrollment](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/web-sdk/web-sdk-guide-enrollment.md): "Shows how to enroll a new user by connecting their facial biometrics to PingOne Recognize account."
- [Error handling](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/web-sdk/web-sdk-reference-error-handling.md): "Explains the errors that can occur when using the PingOne Recognize Web SDK and how to handle them."
- [Error Handling](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-error-handling.md): Common errors, what they mean, and recommended next steps.
- [Exporting the client state to authenticate the enrolled user](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/idv-bridge/idv-bridge-exporting-client-state.md): Having successfully enrolled a user through IDV Bridge SaaS, it is critical that integrators export the client state to support account recovery and ongoing authentication through the Mobile SDK.
- [External user ID](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-server-api-external-user-id.md): The External Users ID endpoints of the PingOne Recognize Mobile SDK Server API let you manage external user IDs.
- [Generating Client State](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-generating-client-state.md): This page explains how to create a client state during enrollment or authentication and use it for binding a user on a new device.
- [Getting Started with the PingOne Recognize Mobile SDK](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-getting-started.md): A step-by-step guide to integrating the PingOne Recognize Mobile SDK.
- [Getting started with the PingOne Recognize Server API](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-server-api-getting-started.md): The PingOne Recognize Server API enables communication between your backend and the PingOne Recognize servers.
- [Getting started with the PingOne Recognize Web SDK](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/web-sdk/web-sdk-getting-started.md): The PingOne Recognize Web SDK helps authenticate people, not just devices.
- [Getting started with the Web SDK](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/web-sdk/web-sdk-guide-getting-started.md): "Shows how to get started with the PingOne Recognize Web SDK."
- [How to run PingOne Recognize Agent](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/idv-bridge/idv-bridge-run-p1rcognize-agent.md): This page explains how to set up and run IDV Bridge On-Premise (PingOne Recognize Agent) and the required configurations.
- [IDV Bridge introduction](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/idv-bridge/idv-bridge-introduction.md): Enroll new and existing users into PingOne Recognize with a selfie, portrait or documented collected from outside of PingOne Recognize.
- [IDV Bridge on-premise](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/idv-bridge/idv-bridge-on-premise.md): This page covers the fundamentals that customers need to be aware of when installing PingOne Recognize Agent - the IDV Bridge On-Premise solution.
- [IDV Bridge On-Premise Changelog](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/idv-bridge/idv-bridge-on-premise-changelog.md): Details of IDV Bridge On-Premise (PingOne Recognize Agent) releases.
- [IDV Bridge SaaS](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/idv-bridge/idv-bridge-saas.md): Enroll user images through an API to facilitate ongoing authentication through our Mobile or Web SDK.
- [Infrastructural Requirements](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/on-premise/on-premise-infrastructural-requirements.md): This page describes the infrastructural requirements for deploying PingOne Recognize on-premise.
- [Install the mobile app](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/user-guide/user-guide-install-mobile-app.md): Download and install the app on your iPhone or Android device.
- [Integration flows](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/web-sdk/web-sdk-introduction-integration-flows.md): "Describes how PingOne Recognize components interact with applications."
- [Introducing PingOne Recognize to users](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-introduce-p1recognize-to-users.md): Introduction screen for PingOne Recognize.
- [Introduction to PingOne Recognize](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/introduction/introduction_to_p1recognize.md): This page introduces PingOne Recognize and helps you navigate the documentation.
- [JWT verification best practice](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-jwt-best-practice.md): Use a jwks.json endpoint for JWT verification and seamless key rotation.
- [Liveness Settings](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-liveness-settings.md): Liveness settings available in the PingOne Recognize SDK.
- [Localization](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/web-sdk/web-sdk-reference-localization.md): "Shows how to use localization packs to support multiple languages with the PingOne Recognize Web SDK."
- [Lockout policy](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/web-sdk/web-sdk-reference-lockout-policy.md): "Explains the PingOne Recognize lockout policy, what it means for users, and how to customize it."
- [Lockout Policy](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-lockout-policy.md): This page explains how the lockout policy works, the implications for users, and how it is configured.
- [Logging](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-logging.md): Customers can log additional data from the mobile SDK for performance monitoring, issue investigation, and analytics.
- [Mobile SDK Authentication](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-authentication.md): Learn how to authenticate users with the PingOne Recognize Mobile SDK.
- [Mobile SDK Changelog](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-changelog.md): A changelog for the PingOne Recognize Mobile SDK.
- [Mobile SDK De-Enrollment](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-de-enrollment.md): Learn how to use the PingOne Recognize Mobile SDK.
- [Mobile SDK Enrollment](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-enrollment.md): Learn how to enroll users with the PingOne Recognize Mobile SDK.
- [Mobile SDK Guide](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-guide.md): A guide to the PingOne Recognize Mobile SDK.
- [Mobile SDK Integration Flows](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-integration-flows.md): Learn how the PingOne Recognize components interact with your app.
- [Mobile SDK Introduction](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-introduction.md): Introduction to the Mobile SDK, which enables developers to integrate privacy-preserving biometric authentication into their mobile applications.
- [Mobile SDK JWT Signing](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-jwt-signing.md): Learn how to generate a signed JWT with the PingOne Recognize Mobile SDK.
- [Mobile SDK photo enrollment](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-photo-enrollment.md): Use a photo (for example, from an identity document) to enroll initial biometric data for a user.
- [Mobile SDK Reference](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-reference.md)
- [Mobile SDK Sample Apps](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-sample-apps.md): A description of, and links to, the PingOne Recognize sample apps to support integrators with a working example.
- [Mobile SDK Use Cases](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-use-cases.md): Use cases for the PingOne Recognize Mobile SDK.
- [Monitoring](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/on-premise/on-premise-monitoring.md): This page describes the monitoring capabilities of PingOne Recognize on-premise
- [Multi-threading](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/web-sdk/web-sdk-reference-multi-threaded.md): "Shows how to enable multi-threading in PingOne Recognize using the Web SDK."
- [New Device Activation](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-new-device-activation.md): This page explains how to use a client state to authenticate the user and bind a new device for ongoing two-factor authentication.
- [On-premise deployment](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/on-premise/on-premise-deployment.md): This page describes the deployment procedure for PingOne Recognize on-premise.
- [On-premise installation manual](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/on-premise/on-premise-installation-manual.md): On-Premise installation manual for PingOne Recognize.
- [On-premise installation procedure](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/on-premise/on-premise-installation-procedure.md): This page describes the installation procedure for PingOne Recognize on-premise.
- [On-premise upgrade procedure](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/on-premise/on-premise-upgrade-procedure.md): This page describes the upgrade procedure for PingOne Recognize on-premise
- [Operations](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-server-api-operations.md): The Operations endpoints of the PingOne Recognize Mobile SDK Server API let you review and manage a variety of operations for  PingOne Recognize users.
- [Page in a folder](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/folder-example/page-in-folder.md)
- [PIN Authentication](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-pin-authentication.md): Use a PIN to perform specific operations when biometric authentication is not necessary.
- [PingOne Recognize](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/pingone-recognize.md)
- [PingOne Recognize Agent endpoints](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/idv-bridge/idv-bridge-p1recognize-agent-endpoints.md)
- [PingOne Recognize On-Premise enrollment Web SDK authentication tutorial](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/idv-bridge/idv-bridge-onprem-enrollment-websdk-authentication-tutorial.md): Tutorial for enrolling user selfies with IDV Bridge On-Premise and then authenticating those users in a web app through the Web SDK.
- [Planning for installation](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/on-premise/on-premise-planning-for-installation.md): Planning for installation of PingOne Recognize.
- [Prerequisites](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/web-sdk/web-sdk-prerequisites.md): "Describes prerequisites for using the PingOne Recognize Web SDK."
- [Previous Releases](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/release-notes/index.md)
- [Secret management](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-secret-management.md): The Secret Management feature allows you to securely store, retrieve, update, and delete secrets during enrollment or authentication flow
- [Signing transactions](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/web-sdk/web-sdk-reference-signing-transactions.md): "Shows how to sign PingOne Recognize transaction data after successful authentication or enrollment."
- [Telemetry](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-server-api-telemetry.md): The Telemetry API of the PingOne Recognize Mobile SDK Server API lets you retrieve user metadata or specific transactions.
- [Troubleshooting](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/user-guide/user-guide-troubleshooting.md): How to troubleshoot common issues.
- [Troubleshooting guide](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/troubleshooting/troubleshooting.md)
- [UI customization](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-ui-customization.md): Learn how to customize the PingOne Recognize SDK UI to create a more seamless and branded user experience in your app.
- [User and Device Management](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-user-and-device-management.md): How to manage users and devices with the PingOne Recognize SDK.
- [User authorization](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/web-sdk/web-sdk-reference-user-authorization.md): Web SDK supports a first factor provided by the integrator during the flow.
- [User interface customization](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/web-sdk/web-sdk-reference-customization.md): "Shows how to customize the user interface (UI) components provided with the PingOne Recognize Web SDK."
- [Users](https://docs.pingidentity.com/recognize/mobile-sdk/mobile-sdk-server-api-users.md): The Users API of the PingOne Recognize Mobile SDK Server API performs operations on PingOne Recognize users.
